symbol.description: Ticker symbol to query. Defaults to AAPL, matching the legacy connector.

interval.description: The interval of between prices queried.

range.description: The range of prices to be queried.

base_url.description: Yahoo Finance chart API base URL. Defaults to the legacy connector's public endpoint; override only for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Set to fixture for credential-free legacy fixture tests.
